metadata.description: Curated sources for analytics engineering: transformation tools, semantic layers, data quality, and lineage.

modeling_and_metrics.name: Kimball Group
modeling_and_metrics.relevance: Dimensional modeling principles and warehouse design patterns.

modeling_and_metrics.name: dbt Semantic Layer
modeling_and_metrics.relevance: Metric definitions and semantic model patterns for analytics.

modeling_and_metrics.name: dbt Metrics
modeling_and_metrics.relevance: Metric definition syntax and modeling constraints.

modeling_and_metrics.name: Looker LookML Reference
modeling_and_metrics.relevance: Semantic modeling patterns used in BI layers.

modeling_and_metrics.name: State of Analytics Engineering 2025
modeling_and_metrics.relevance: Industry trends, semantic layer adoption, AI integration patterns.

transformation_tools.name: dbt Documentation
transformation_tools.relevance: Transformation workflows, testing, and project structure.

transformation_tools.name: SQLMesh Documentation
transformation_tools.relevance: Stateful transformations, virtual environments, performance optimization.

transformation_tools.name: Coalesce Documentation
transformation_tools.relevance: Visual transformation development, column-level lineage, enterprise governance.

semantic_layer.name: Cube Documentation
semantic_layer.relevance: Headless BI, semantic caching, pre-aggregations, API-first analytics.

semantic_layer.name: dbt Semantic Layer Best Practices
semantic_layer.relevance: MetricFlow patterns, semantic model design, metric governance.

data_quality.name: Great Expectations Documentation
data_quality.relevance: Data quality testing and validation suites for Python pipelines.

data_quality.name: Elementary Documentation
data_quality.relevance: ML-based anomaly detection, dbt test observability, data monitoring.

data_quality.name: dbt-expectations (Metaplane)
data_quality.relevance: Extended dbt tests inspired by Great Expectations. Actively maintained fork.

lineage_and_governance.name: OpenLineage

trends_and_analysis.relevance: Detailed comparison of dbt and SQLMesh architecture and performance.
